description:
openFDA medical device regulatory data — 510(k) clearances, PMA approvals, device recalls,
MAUDE adverse events, classifications, and establishment registrations.

Free public data, no auth required. Optional API key (OPENFDA_API_KEY) raises the daily
request cap from 1,000 to 120,000.

tools.name: device_list-classification
tools.description: Search device product-code classifications. Returns the SearchEnvelope.

tools.name: device_list-establishment
tools.description: Search establishment registrations. Returns the SearchEnvelope.

tools.name: device_list-maude
tools.description: Search MAUDE adverse events. Returns the SearchEnvelope.

tools.name: device_list-pma
tools.description: Search PMA approvals. Returns the SearchEnvelope.

tools.name: device_list-recall
tools.description: Search device recalls. Returns the SearchEnvelope.
